race.comment: Competitive. PHOENICIAN (4) is edging towards a win, the latest effort a solid third over 2400m at Moe. Should camp just off the leaders and switching back to a middle distance won't be an issue for him. Is well overdue, and he gets his chance in this line-up. AVONVIEW (9) just missed at Kyneton, and then again at this track/trip. Positions forward and keeps the handy 2kg claim. A decent chance to go one better.  THREE REEL ROSES (10) is third-up and will appreciate the step-up in trip. Raced well over staying distances last campaign and will be in the finish if this turns into a slog. MAKUSHA (3) stepped up quickly from 1607m to 2200m a mile and didn't appreciate racing on the bunny at Donald. Will likely take a sit today and back 200m will suit. Rates well enough at best to feature.
